high_level_description: A wide cinematic header image for a technology blog post about Kubernetes GitOps. In the foreground, friendly flat-design server racks float in a clean data-center corridor. Soft blue and amber light glows from rack LEDs. The scene is modern, organized, and calm.

style_description.aesthetics: clean flat vector illustration, technology blog hero image, minimal, no photorealism
style_description.lighting: soft ambient blue and amber LED glow, no harsh shadows
style_description.photo: wide 16:9 establishing shot, deep perspective down a tidy corridor

compositional_deconstruction.background: soft gradient from dark blue at the top to light grey at the bottom, subtle data-center ceiling lights receding into perspective
compositional_deconstruction.layout: Left third: large friendly server rack with status LEDs. Center: corridor leading to a glowing exit. Right third: smaller racks and floating abstract GitOps/Git symbols.

elements.desc: A tall server rack with rounded corners, soft blue metal, amber and green status LEDs arranged in a grid.
A glowing Git branch/merge icon made of thick white lines, floating in the corridor.
Floating geometric cubes and rectangles representing containers and microservices, in blue and amber.

elements.style: bold sans-serif, white with blue drop shadow
